prompt: I have a PRD for a new multi-tenant billing system at docs/prds/billing-v2.md. It covers subscription management, metered billing, invoicing, and payment processing. Analyze it and create a full implementation plan with epics, stories, and tasks. I need dependency ordering and estimates.

assertions.text: Reads and analyzes the PRD document
Assigns appropriate skills to features (api-design, database-design, etc.)
Flags ambiguities or unclear requirements before planning
